title: Stork Bites Man
writer: Cy Endfield, Fred Freiberger, Louis Pollock
actors: Jackie Cooper, Meg Randall, Emory Parnell
plot: Ernie (Jackie Cooper), manager of an apartment house that allows no children, finds himself evicted when his wife, Peg (Meg Randall as Gene Roberts), becomes pregnant. With the help of an imaginary stork and a large department sto...
